title: Marwari New Testament
title_vernacular: मत्ती रौ लिखियौड़ौ यीसु रौ सुभ सन्देस
description: Translated from the Originals into the Marwar language. By the Serampore Missionaries. Vol. V. The New Testament. Serampore: [Mission Press], 1821.

language.name: Marwari (Pakistan)
language.area: Northern Marwari in south Punjab and north Sindh, north of Dadu and Nawabshah; Southern Marwari in Sindh and south Punjab provinces, between Tando Mohammed Khan and Tando Ghulam Ali to the south, Dadu and Nawabshab to the north.
